title: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (control of Livestock and Other Animals) Bye-laws
title_en: Local Government : Subsidiary Legislation : North East District Council (control of Livestock and Other Animals) Bye-laws

provisions.title: Citation
provisions.content:
1. Citation
These Bye-laws may be cited as the North East District Council (Control of Livestock and Other Animals) Bye-Laws.
